text:
Market today: Mixed signals. Positive news for tech/chips from TSMC and Meta, but rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions could create broader market jitters. This directly impacts your tech-heavy book.

Your holdings: SOXL and SPAL are both leveraged ETFs showing significant drawdowns (-30.32% and -32.92% respectively) and are flagged for attention. PTNM is a new, tiny spec down -15.25%. Margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on TSMC's earnings report on Thursday—it's a major bellwether for your chip names. Also, monitor the oil situation for broader market sentiment shifts.

Bottom line: Focus on managing risk in your leveraged positions and stay alert for chip sector catalysts.
plays: Consider trimming SOXL given its SELL status and deep -30.32% loss; its leveraged nature means decay amplifies drawdowns.
Review SPAL's stop loss immediately; its NEW status, -32.92% loss, and leveraged decay demand swift action to protect capital.
Consider a new position in META on its positive data center news, using the scanner entry 656.22-655.57 with a stop at 654.21.
